test_cases.title: event-adapter translates setStatus to plugin:statusSetUpdate
test_cases.description: Verify that EventAdapter.translate() returns a ServerMessage with type 'plugin:statusSetUpdate' when receiving an extension_ui_request with method 'setStatus'
steps: Create EventAdapter instance with test sessionId
Call translate() with extension_ui_request event containing method='setStatus', key='goal', text='◆ Goal 1/20'
Assert returned ServerMessage type === 'plugin:statusSetUpdate'
Assert payload.sessionId === test sessionId
Assert payload.key === 'goal'
Assert payload.text === '◆ Goal 1/20'

test_cases.title: event-adapter still discards setWidget
test_cases.description: Verify that EventAdapter.translate() returns null for method 'setWidget'
steps: Call translate() with extension_ui_request event containing method='setWidget'
Assert return value === null

test_cases.title: server.ts bridge:event calls handleBridgeEvent
test_cases.description: Verify that handleBridgeRequest('bridge:event') calls pluginService.handleBridgeEvent() instead of only logging
steps: Set up mock pluginService with spy on handleBridgeEvent
Call handleBridgeRequest with method='bridge:event', data={eventName: 'agent_start'}
Assert pluginService.handleBridgeEvent called with ('agent_start', data, sessionId)

test_cases.title: server.ts routes statusSetUpdate to plugin hooks
test_cases.description: Verify that event-adapter's statusSetUpdate message triggers plugin hooks via handleBridgeEvent
steps: Register a test plugin with onPiEvent hook for 'statusSetUpdate'
Simulate event-adapter producing a statusSetUpdate message
Assert plugin hook handler receives {sessionId, key, text}

test_cases.title: statusline plugin forwards setStatus to updateStatusBarItem
test_cases.description: Verify that statusline plugin hook handler calls api.ui.updateStatusBarItem with correct metadata
steps: Activate statusline plugin with mock api
Trigger hook with {sessionId: 's1', key: 'goal', text: '◆ Goal 3/20'}
Assert api.ui.updateStatusBarItem called with id='goal', text='◆ Goal 3/20'
Assert options.priority === 10 (from mapping table)
Assert options.scope === 'per-session'

test_cases.title: statusline plugin handles unknown key with defaults
test_cases.description: Verify that unknown setStatus key uses default metadata
steps: Activate statusline plugin with mock api
Trigger hook with {sessionId: 's1', key: 'unknown_ext', text: 'Some status'}
Assert options.priority === 100 (default)
Assert options.scope === 'global' (default)

test_cases.title: updateStatusBarItem with new options parameters
test_cases.description: Verify that plugin-service handles new options (tooltip, commandId, priority, scope, sessionId)
steps: Call updateStatusBarItem('p1', 'item1', 'Hello', {priority: 10, scope: 'per-session', sessionId: 's1'})
Assert Map contains item1 with correct fields
Assert WS broadcast sent with updated items list

test_cases.title: updateStatusBarItem backward compatible without options
test_cases.description: Verify that calling updateStatusBarItem without options uses defaults
steps: Call updateStatusBarItem('p1', 'item1', 'Hello')
Assert stored item has priority=100, scope='global', sessionId=undefined

test_cases.title: updateStatusBarItem merge behavior
test_cases.description: Verify that multiple calls merge into Map instead of replacing
steps: Call updateStatusBarItem('p1', 'item1', 'Hello')
Call updateStatusBarItem('p2', 'item2', 'World')
Assert Map has 2 items
Assert WS broadcast contains both items

test_cases.title: InputToolbar shows model picker and context bar
test_cases.description: Verify InputToolbar renders model name, context progress bar, and token stats
steps: Set chatStore contextUsagePercent=45, contextInputTokens=500
Mount InputToolbar with sessionId
Assert model picker displays current model name
Assert context bar shows 45% with accent color
Assert token stats show '↑500'

test_cases.title: InputToolbar thinking level picker visibility
test_cases.description: Verify thinking level picker hides for non-reasoning models
steps: Set current model to gpt-4o (reasoning=false, thinkingLevelMap=undefined)
Mount InputToolbar
Assert thinking level picker is not rendered

test_cases.title: InputToolbar thinking level picker shows dynamic levels
test_cases.description: Verify thinking level picker reads from thinkingLevelMap keys
steps: Set current model to o3 (reasoning=true, thinkingLevelMap={low: 'low', medium: 'medium', high: 'high'})
Mount InputToolbar
Assert thinking level picker shows 3 options: low, medium, high

test_cases.title: InputToolbar context bar color thresholds
test_cases.description: Verify context bar color changes at 60% and 85%
steps: Set contextUsagePercent=50 → assert accent color class
Set contextUsagePercent=70 → assert warning color class
Set contextUsagePercent=90 → assert danger color class

test_cases.title: SessionStrip shows per-session extension chips
test_cases.description: Verify SessionStrip filters items by sessionId and scope
steps: Set pluginStore with items: [{id:'goal', scope:'per-session', sessionId:'s1'}, {id:'preset', scope:'global'}]
Mount SessionStrip with sessionId='s1'
Assert only goal chip is rendered
Assert preset chip is NOT rendered

test_cases.title: SessionStrip independent in split panel
test_cases.description: Verify two SessionStrip instances show different data for different sessions
steps: Set pluginStore with goal item for session A only
Mount SessionStrip for session A → shows goal chip
Mount SessionStrip for session B → no chips

test_cases.title: Global Statusbar shows only global scope items
test_cases.description: Verify AppStatusbar right section shows scope=global items sorted by priority
steps: Set pluginStore with items: [{id:'preset', scope:'global', priority:30}, {id:'goal', scope:'per-session', priority:10}]
Mount AppStatusbar
Assert right section shows only preset chip
Assert goal chip is NOT in Global Statusbar

test_cases.title: End-to-end: pi setStatus → SessionStrip display
test_cases.description: Full pipeline test from pi extension setStatus to frontend SessionStrip rendering
steps: Start dev server with statusline plugin active
Simulate pi extension calling setStatus('goal', '◆ Goal 1/5')
Verify event-adapter translates to plugin:statusSetUpdate
Verify statusline plugin calls updateStatusBarItem
Verify plugin:statusBarUpdate broadcast reaches frontend
Verify SessionStrip renders goal chip with correct text

test_cases.title: built-in-plugin-guide.md completeness check
test_cases.description: Verify the guide covers manifest, activation, hooks, API, and uses statusline plugin as example
steps: Open docs/plugin/built-in-plugin-guide.md
Verify manifest structure section exists with xyzAgent field example
Verify activationEvents section exists
Verify hooks registration section exists with onPiEvent example
Verify statusBarUpdate API section exists with options parameter docs
Verify statusline plugin is used as running example
